text: Science has a clearer story about feedback loops than social media does. Feedback loops are systems where output influences input, creating a cycle. Think about climate change. Positive feedback loops amplify effects, like melting ice leading to more heat absorption. Research shows feedback loops can stabilize systems too, like ecosystems maintaining balance. Understanding these loops helps us predict outcomes and make informed decisions, both in nature and technology. Curious about more science insights? Like and follow for more deep dives!
